member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService
member.summary: WhatsApp Cloud API service for sending messages via Meta's Graph API. Supports text, templates, media (image/document/audio/video/sticker), interactive messages (buttons/list/CTA), reactions, read receipts and webhook validation.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService.SendTextAsync(Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTextRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a plain text message. Requires an active 24-hour conversation window with the recipient.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService.SendTemplateAsync(Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTemplateRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a pre-approved message template. Works at any time — no 24-hour window required. Supports header (text/image/document/video), body params, and button params.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService.SendMediaAsync(Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppMediaRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a media message (image, document, audio, video or sticker). Provide either or . Requires an active 24-hour window unless combined with a template.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService.UploadMediaAsync(Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaUpload,Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a media file to the WhatsApp Media API and returns a reusable media ID. Use the returned ID in or template parameters.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService.SendLocationAsync(Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppLocationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a location pin message.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService.SendInteractiveAsync(Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an interactive message: quick-reply buttons, scrollable list menu, or call-to-action URL button.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService.SendReactionAsync(Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppReactionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an emoji reaction to a received message. Pass an empty to remove an existing reaction.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService.MarkAsReadAsync(System.String,Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks a received message as read (shows double blue ticks to the sender).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Abstractions.IWhatsAppService.ValidateWebhookSignature(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates the X-Hub-Signature-256 header from an incoming Meta webhook request. Uses HMAC-SHA256 with the configured .
member.param: Optional override for the app secret. When null, uses .

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Extensions.WhatsAppServiceExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering the WhatsApp Cloud API notification service.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Extensions.WhatsAppServiceExtensions.AddWhatsAppService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds to the DI container, binding configuration from the "WhatsApp" section of .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Extensions.WhatsAppServiceExtensions.AddWhatsAppService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions})
member.summary: Adds to the DI container using an inline configuration action.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials
member.summary: Per-request credential override for multi-tenant scenarios. When set on any send request, these credentials take precedence over the default configuration in .

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials.AccountName
member.summary: References a named account from . When set, the named account's credentials are used and other fields are ignored.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials.PhoneNumberId
member.summary: WhatsApp Business phone number ID (inline override). Both and must be set together.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials.AccessToken
member.summary: Meta Graph API access token (inline override).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials.BusinessAccountId
member.summary: Optional inline WhatsApp Business Account ID.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials.FromAccount(System.String)
member.summary: Creates credentials that reference a named account from .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials.Inline(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates inline credentials without requiring appsettings configuration.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions
member.summary: Configuration for the WhatsApp Cloud API service. Bind from the "WhatsApp" section of your appsettings.json via services.AddWhatsAppService(configuration).

member.name: F:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.SectionName
member.summary: The appsettings section name.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.PhoneNumberId
member.summary: Default WhatsApp Business phone number ID. Obtain from Meta Business Manager → WhatsApp → API Setup.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.AccessToken
member.summary: Default Meta Graph API access token (permanent system-user token recommended).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.BusinessAccountId
member.summary: Optional: default WhatsApp Business Account ID (WABA ID).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.AppSecret
member.summary: App secret used for webhook signature validation (X-Hub-Signature-256). Found in Meta App Dashboard → Settings → Basic → App Secret.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.Accounts
member.summary: Named accounts for multi-tenant scenarios. Each entry maps an account key to its credentials. Pass the key via in any request.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.ApiVersion
member.summary: Meta Graph API version. Default: v23.0 (current stable, April 2026). Change to a newer version as Meta releases updates.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL for the Meta Graph API. Default: https://graph.facebook.com.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: HTTP request timeout in seconds for individual API calls. Default: 30. The resilience handler's total timeout may be higher due to retries.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions.DefaultCountryCode
member.summary: Default country dialing code used when normalizing phone numbers that start with "0" (e.g., "593" for Ecuador maps 09xxxxxxxx → 593 9xxxxxxxx). Leave null to skip automatic prefix expansion.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppAccountOptions
member.summary: Credentials for a named WhatsApp Business account in multi-tenant setups.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppAccountOptions.PhoneNumberId
member.summary: WhatsApp Business phone number ID for this account.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppAccountOptions.AccessToken
member.summary: Meta Graph API access token for this account.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppAccountOptions.BusinessAccountId
member.summary: Optional WhatsApp Business Account ID (WABA ID).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppBaseRequest
member.summary: Base record shared by all WhatsApp send request types.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppBaseRequest.To
member.summary: Recipient phone number. Accepts E.164 format (+5930991234567), digits-only (5930991234567), or local format with leading zero (0991234567) when is configured.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppBaseRequest.Credentials
member.summary: Optional per-request credential override. When null, the default credentials from are used.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTextRequest
member.summary: Sends a plain text message to the recipient. The recipient must have initiated contact within the last 24 hours.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTextRequest.Body
member.summary: Message body text (max 4 096 characters).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTextRequest.PreviewUrl
member.summary: When true, Meta renders a URL preview card for links found in . Default: false.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTextRequest.ContextMessageId
member.summary: Set to the wamid.* of a received message to reply in a thread.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTemplateRequest
member.summary: Sends a pre-approved WhatsApp message template. Templates bypass the 24-hour rule and can be sent to opted-in users at any time.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTemplateRequest.TemplateName
member.summary: Exact name of the approved template as shown in WhatsApp Business Manager.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTemplateRequest.LanguageCode
member.summary: Language + locale code (e.g. "en_US", "es_EC"). Must match the language approved for the template.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTemplateRequest.Components
member.summary: Optional component parameter overrides (header, body, buttons). Use factory helpers to build components.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppTemplateRequest.ContextMessageId
member.summary: Set to the wamid.* of a received message to reply in a thread.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent
member.summary: A parameterized component within a template (header, body, or button).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.Type
member.summary: Component type: "header", "body", or "button".

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.Parameters
member.summary: Parameters for this component (text, image, document, video, etc.).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.SubType
member.summary: Button sub-type: "url" or "quick_reply". Required only when is "button".

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.Index
member.summary: Zero-based index of the button within the template. Required only when is "button".

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.Body(System.String[])
member.summary: Creates a body component with text parameters.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.HeaderText(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a header component with a single text value.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.HeaderImage(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a header component with an image (by URL or media ID).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.HeaderDocument(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a header component with a document (by URL or media ID).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.HeaderVideo(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a header component with a video (by URL or media ID).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.QuickReplyButton(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a quick-reply button component.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateComponent.UrlButton(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a URL button component with a dynamic URL suffix.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter
member.summary: A single parameter within a template component.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter.Type
member.summary: Parameter type: "text", "image", "document", "video", "payload", "currency", "date_time".

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter.Text
member.summary: Text value for "text" or button "payload" types.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter.Image
member.summary: Image media object for "image" type.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter.Document
member.summary: Document media object for "document" type.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter.Video
member.summary: Video media object for "video" type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter.FromText(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a text parameter.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter.FromImage(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates an image parameter (URL or pre-uploaded media ID).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter.FromDocument(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a document parameter (URL or pre-uploaded media ID).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppTemplateParameter.FromVideo(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a video parameter (URL or pre-uploaded media ID).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaObject
member.summary: A reference to a media asset — either by publicly accessible URL or by WhatsApp media ID.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaObject.Id
member.summary: Pre-uploaded WhatsApp Media ID (returned by IWhatsAppService.UploadMediaAsync).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaObject.Link
member.summary: Publicly accessible HTTPS URL for the media file.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaObject.Filename
member.summary: Filename shown to the recipient. Applicable to documents only.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaObject.Caption
member.summary: Optional caption text. Applicable to image, video, and document messages.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaType
member.summary: Identifies the type of media to be sent in a WhatsApp media message.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaType.Image
member.summary: JPEG, PNG image (max 5 MB). Supports captions.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaType.Document
member.summary: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, etc. (max 100 MB). Supports captions and filename.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaType.Audio
member.summary: AAC, MP3, OGG audio (max 16 MB). No captions.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaType.Video
member.summary: MP4, 3GPP video (max 16 MB). Supports captions.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaType.Sticker
member.summary: WebP sticker (max 100 KB static / 500 KB animated). No captions.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppMediaRequest
member.summary: Sends a media message to the recipient. Requires an active 24-hour conversation window. For outbound-initiated media, use a template with a media header instead.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppMediaRequest.MediaType
member.summary: Type of media to send.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppMediaRequest.MediaUrl
member.summary: Publicly accessible HTTPS URL of the media file. Provide either or , not both.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppMediaRequest.MediaId
member.summary: Pre-uploaded WhatsApp Media ID (from IWhatsAppService.UploadMediaAsync). Provide either or , not both.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppMediaRequest.Caption
member.summary: Optional caption. Supported for image, video, and document. Not for audio or sticker.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppMediaRequest.Filename
member.summary: Filename shown to the recipient. Only applicable to documents.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppMediaRequest.ContextMessageId
member.summary: Set to the wamid.* of a received message to reply in a thread.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaUpload
member.summary: Encapsulates a file for upload to the WhatsApp Media API. Uses instead of IFormFile to remain independent of ASP.NET Core.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaUpload.FileStream
member.summary: The file data stream. The service does NOT dispose this stream — the caller is responsible for disposing it after the call completes. Pass this to IWhatsAppService.UploadMediaAsync to get a reusable media ID.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaUpload.FileName
member.summary: Original file name including extension (e.g., "invoice.pdf").

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppMediaUpload.ContentType
member.summary: MIME content type (e.g., "application/pdf", "image/jpeg").

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppLocationRequest
member.summary: Sends a map location pin to the recipient.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppLocationRequest.Latitude
member.summary: Decimal latitude of the location.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppLocationRequest.Longitude
member.summary: Decimal longitude of the location.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppLocationRequest.Name
member.summary: Optional location name displayed above the map.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppLocationRequest.Address
member.summary: Optional formatted address displayed below the location name.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppInteractiveType
member.summary: Specifies the layout type of an interactive message.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppInteractiveType.Button
member.summary: Up to 3 quick-reply buttons.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppInteractiveType.List
member.summary: Scrollable list with sections and rows (up to 10 rows total).

member.name: F:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppInteractiveType.CtaUrl
member.summary: Single call-to-action button that opens a URL.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest
member.summary: Sends an interactive message with buttons, a list menu, or a CTA URL button.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.InteractiveType
member.summary: Type of interactive layout to render.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.BodyText
member.summary: Main message body text shown to the recipient.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.HeaderText
member.summary: Optional header text (plain text; image/document/video headers not supported here).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.FooterText
member.summary: Optional footer text displayed below the action area (max 60 chars).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.ReplyButtons
member.summary: Quick-reply buttons (1–3) for . Button IDs are returned in the webhook payload when tapped.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.ListButtonLabel
member.summary: Label for the list-open button (max 20 chars). Used for . Defaults to "Options".

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.ListSections
member.summary: Sections containing selectable rows. Used for .

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.CtaDisplayText
member.summary: Button display text for (e.g., "Open portal"). Defaults to "Open".

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.CtaUrl
member.summary: Full URL opened when the CTA button is tapped. Used for .

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppInteractiveRequest.ContextMessageId
member.summary: Set to the wamid.* of a received message to reply in a thread.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppReplyButton
member.summary: A quick-reply button in an interactive button message.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppReplyButton.Id
member.summary: Unique button identifier returned by the webhook when the user taps this button. Max 256 chars.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppReplyButton.Title
member.summary: Button display label (max 20 chars).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppListSection
member.summary: A section within an interactive list message.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppListSection.Title
member.summary: Optional section heading shown above its rows.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppListSection.Rows
member.summary: The selectable rows within this section.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppListRow
member.summary: A selectable row within a list section.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppListRow.Id
member.summary: Unique row identifier returned by the webhook when selected. Max 200 chars.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppListRow.Title
member.summary: Row title (max 24 chars).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppListRow.Description
member.summary: Optional secondary description text (max 72 chars).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppReactionRequest
member.summary: Sends an emoji reaction to a specific received message.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppReactionRequest.MessageId
member.summary: The wamid.* message ID to react to.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.SendWhatsAppReactionRequest.Emoji
member.summary: The emoji character to react with (e.g., "👍"). Pass an empty string "" to remove an existing reaction.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppResult
member.summary: Result of a WhatsApp Cloud API send or status operation. Check before accessing .

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppResult.IsSuccess
member.summary: Whether the API call succeeded.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppResult.MessageId
member.summary: The WhatsApp message ID (wamid.*) assigned by Meta. Only populated when is true.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppResult.RecipientWaId
member.summary: The recipient's WhatsApp ID (normalized phone number) as confirmed by Meta. Only populated when is true.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppResult.Error
member.summary: Error details when is false.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppResult.Success(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a successful result.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppResult.Failure(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failure result from error components.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppResult.Failure(Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppApiError)
member.summary: Creates a failure result from a structured error object.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppApiError
member.summary: Structured error returned by the Meta Graph API or the service itself.
member.param: Meta error code (negative values are library-internal codes).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppApiError.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Structured error returned by the Meta Graph API or the service itself.
member.param: Meta error code (negative values are library-internal codes).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppApiError.Code
member.summary: Meta error code (negative values are library-internal codes).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppApiError.Message
member.summary: Error message string.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppApiError.Type
member.summary: Error type string from Meta (e.g., "OAuthException").

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppApiError.ErrorSubcode
member.summary: Error subcode for finer classification (see Meta error code reference).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppApiError.FbtraceId
member.summary: Facebook trace ID — include this when filing a Meta Developer Support ticket.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppApiError.UserMessage
member.summary: User-facing error title from Meta (can be displayed to end-users). Sourced from error_user_title in the Graph API response.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Services.WhatsAppService
member.summary: WhatsApp Cloud API service implementation targeting Meta Graph API v23.0. Registered as a singleton; uses for thread-safe, lifecycle-managed HTTP connections with built-in resilience (retry + circuit breaker).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Services.WhatsAppService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Services.WhatsAppService},Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppOptions})
member.summary: Creates a new instance.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Services.WhatsAppService.ResolveCredentials(Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Models.WhatsAppCredentials)
member.summary: Resolves effective credentials following priority order: per-request named account → per-request inline → default from options.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Notifications.WhatsApp.Services.WhatsAppService.NormalizePhone(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a phone number to digits-only, applying when the number starts with a leading zero (e.g., Ecuadorian 09xxxxxxxx → 593 9xxxxxxxx).
